pages.text: $(thing)蘑菇培育桶$()用于培育蘑菇。可将蘑菇及下界作物放入其中。当其放置在蘑菇旁时，将消耗内部储存的物品，使周边的该种蘑菇每日增殖一次。

pages.title: Extra Notes
pages.text: The $(thing)Unposter$() searches for and duplicates mushrooms in a 11x11 square area centered on itself.$(br2)Note that mushrooms, once picked up, cannot be placed back down. You will need to find naturally spawned mushrooms for the unposter to work.
